title: Letter S
text: s s s s s as as as sa sa sa ass
tips: S is right next to A
Try "as" and "sa" — your first tiny word!

character_tips.anna: S is next to A. Try "as" — your first word! 🌸
character_tips.maxim: Two letters now. Tiny words possible.
character_tips.knopych: S unlocked! Try 'as' — that's a real word! 🌟
character_tips.klavochka: Two letters, two friends, my dear! Like A and S holding hands ✨
